title: Electric Bug Zapper, Portable Insect Pest Fly Killer with 2 Light Modes and Type-C Charging Port, 360° Mosquito Killer Lamp for Camping, Outdoor, Travel, Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Backyard
features: 2-In-1 Mosquito Killer Lamp: This 2-in-1 device operates as a mosquito zapper and warm night light. The insect-killing mode uses UV light to eliminate mosquitoes, flies, and gnats, while the soft warming light provides ambient illumination for nurseries, patios, or pet areas—replacing chemical sprays and harsh lanterns.This mosquito killer lamp can be hung or placed on a countertop, suitable for various scene needs.

Safe to Use : Encased in shatterproof plastic with a sealed internal zapping grid, this unit prevents accidental contact with high-voltage components. It emits zero toxins, fumes, or chemical residues, making it safe for homes with crawling infants, curious pets, or allergy sufferers. The external mesh barrier adds an extra layer of physical protection.

Portable with USB-C Charging: Equipped with a 1200mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers up to 7 hours of continuous mosquito zapping or 7 hours of low-light illumination. The Type-C port supports charging via power banks, car adapters, or solar generators—adapt for camping trips, backyard dinners, living room, bedroom, kitchen or emergency nursery lighting during outages.

360° High-Efficiency Insect Elimination: Scientifically tuned UV wavelengths (335nm–365nm) attract insects from all directions to an internal high-voltage grid. Lab-tested to kill 98% of mosquitoes within 24 hours, it covers spaces up to 300 sq ft—effective for bedrooms, tents, garages, outdoor, indoor, pool and gardens without noise or fumes.

Durable Construction: Crafted from flame-retardant, high-temperature-resistant ABS plastic, it withstands drops, rain, and extreme heat (up to 140°F/60°C). The insect pest fly killer package includes a hanging hook for tents/patios.If you have any questions about this mosquito killer lamp, please feel free to contact us at any time. We will answer your questions within 24 hours.
